evidence_summary: Establish a sense of rest within the massive marble and gold architecture by transitioning to an intimate, low-key interior. Use the introduction of local fauna to ground the alien setting through tactile, strange biological details.
Sola leads the Narrator to a decorated sleeping chamber. Inside, the Narrator encounters a strange, ten-legged Martian creature with a frog-like head and tusks.
Sola leads The Narrator toward the chamber entrance under low-key lighting.
The Narrator observes the Small Martian Creature in close proximity.
Sola guides The Narrator into a room where they discover an alien creature.
